canonical_truth_summary: Canonical truth: data inputs are ready; the live blocker is promotion-stage failure on drawdown plus benchmark baseline discrepancy, and the old missing-bars path is archived.
communication_preference: Use direct Chinese for human-facing summaries; name the strategy first and the system action second.
current_blocker: Promotion is currently blocked: max drawdown 50.44% exceeds 30.00%, and direct promote_candidate also reports benchmark_missing:000001.
current_capability_boundary: 研究输入与验证入口已就绪，当前已进入策略验证 / 晋级受阻阶段；真正卡住的是最大回撤仍高于 30%。
current_strategy_summary: The active main track remains baseline_limit_up. This run did not add new strategy research; it only unified project identity, blocker narrative, and reporting visibility around the promotion-stage failure.
current_task: Keep promotion honest by separating data-readiness blockers from strategy-quality blockers.
default_project_data_status: ready coverage: 715/715 symbols with validated bars (coverage_ratio=1.0000, raw_rows=1441021, cleaned_rows=1419045, validated_rows=1419045).
durable_facts: Validated daily bars are ready for 715/715 symbols in the active project.
The current live blocker is promotion-stage failure: max drawdown 50.44% > 30.00% plus benchmark_missing:000001 in direct promote_candidate.
Main track: baseline_limit_up. Secondary tracks: risk_constrained_limit_up, tighter_entry_limit_up. Rejected track: legacy_single_branch.
Configured subagent gate remains AUTO, but the effective decision for this run is OFF.
effective_subagent_gate_reason: The current work is still a single-path drawdown blocker and reporting cleanup, so parallel subagents are not justified.

blocked_by: Promotion is currently blocked: max drawdown 50.44% exceeds 30.00%, and direct promote_candidate also reports benchmark_missing:000001.
strategy_candidates.core_hypothesis: 过去一段时间反复出现涨停、随后回到突破起点附近的主板个股，后续更容易再次走强；先把这条主线稳定保存成基线，再评估其它改法。
strategy_candidates.economic_rationale: A 股主板里的涨停通常意味着资金短时间集中抢筹。若个股涨停后没有彻底转弱，而是在突破起点附近重新整理，说明强势资金可能仍在，后续二次启动概率更高；保留基线则能判断后续改动到底是在修复风险还是只是在制造噪音。
strategy_candidates.kill_criteria: 如果可用输入恢复后，这条主线在泄漏、可交易性、walk-forward 与成本压力检查下仍无法把最大回撤压到 30% 以内，就停止继续把它当主线。
strategy_candidates.latest_action: No new strategy validation this run; only canonical identity and blocker cleanup.
strategy_candidates.latest_result: Still blocked by max drawdown 50.44% > 30.00% and benchmark_missing:000001 in direct promote_candidate.
strategy_candidates.name: 涨停主线基线分支
strategy_candidates.next_validation: Decompose drawdown and reconcile benchmark_missing:000001 before choosing the next branch validation.
strategy_candidates.required_data: 主板 A 股日频 OHLCV、上市天数、ST/板块过滤、涨停代理、下个交易日收益、基准与等权基线。

blocked_by: Promotion is currently blocked: max drawdown 50.44% exceeds 30.00%, and direct promote_candidate also reports benchmark_missing:000001.
strategy_candidates.core_hypothesis: 在不破坏涨停回踩再启动这个主线定义的前提下，更严格的止损、市场过滤或持仓约束可以显著降低回撤。
strategy_candidates.economic_rationale: 如果主线 alpha 来自强势股二次启动，而不是单纯硬扛波动，那么更强的风险约束应该先砍掉最差交易，同时保住大部分有效信号。
strategy_candidates.kill_criteria: 如果回撤改善很弱、但收益和通过率明显恶化，就停止继续扩大这条风控分支。
strategy_candidates.latest_action: No new strategy validation this run; waiting for the baseline_limit_up blocker decomposition.
strategy_candidates.latest_result: No new decision delta; the branch stays secondary and blocked.

blocked_by: Promotion is currently blocked: max drawdown 50.44% exceeds 30.00%, and direct promote_candidate also reports benchmark_missing:000001.
strategy_candidates.core_hypothesis: 把入选阈值收紧，只保留更接近再次启动位置的个股，可以减少过早买入带来的假突破和大回撤。
strategy_candidates.economic_rationale: 如果真正的二次启动往往发生在更接近突破起点、筹码更集中的位置，那么收紧入场条件应该先减少质量差的提前埋伏。
strategy_candidates.kill_criteria: 如果收紧入场后只是在减少交易次数，却没有改善回撤或收益质量，就停止继续扩展这条分支。
